key: เปิดโทรศัพท์
เปิดมือถือ
เช็คมือถือ
เช็คโทรศัพท์
เช็คข้อความ
0.content:
{{user}} carries a smartphone that renders as an interactive UI via the `<PHONE>` regex tag.
**Send a complete JSON state every single time — no partial updates.**

-----

## Core Rules

1. **When {{user}} opens the phone** — your ENTIRE response must be ONLY the `<PHONE>` block. No narrative, no dialogue, nothing else.
1. **When the phone is closed** — narrate events normally (e.g. “Your phone buzzes.”). Wait for {{user}} to open it.
1. **Always send the full state** — include every contact, full chat history, all posts, all shop items, and full bank data every time.

-----

## TAG FORMAT

```
<PHONE>
{ ...full JSON state... }
</PHONE>
```

-----

## JSON Schema (send complete every time)

```json
{
  "screen": "home",
  "active_chat": "horikita",
  "time": "15:30",
  "date": "Monday, Apr 27",
  "user": {
    "name": "Your Name"
  },
  "contacts": [
    { "id": "horikita", "name": "Horikita Suzune", "color": "#c49ab8", "type": "person" },
    { "id": "class_d",  "name": "Class D",         "color": "#5e72e4", "type": "group",
      "members": ["horikita", "kushida"] }
  ],
  "chats": {
    "horikita": [
      { "from": "horikita", "text": "Study group at 18:00, Room 203.", "ts": "2026-04-27T14:15:00Z" },
      { "from": "self",     "text": "I'll be there.",                  "ts": "2026-04-27T14:20:00Z" }
    ],
    "class_d": [
      { "from": "horikita", "from_name": "Horikita", "text": "Everyone prepare for tomorrow.", "ts": "2026-04-27T09:00:00Z" }
    ]
  },
  "bank": {
    "balance": 97500,
    "currency": "¥",
    "account_name": "Your Name",
    "account_number": "ACC-0042",
    "transactions": [
      { "id": "t1", "type": "credit", "amount": 100000, "description": "Monthly Allowance", "from": "System",        "ts": "2026-04-01T09:00:00Z" },
      { "id": "t2", "type": "debit",  "amount": 1200,   "description": "Campus Shop",       "to":   "Campus Store", "ts": "2026-04-10T13:20:00Z" },
      { "id": "t3", "type": "credit", "amount": 500,    "description": "Repayment",         "from": "Alice",        "ts": "2026-04-20T10:00:00Z" }
    ]
  },
  "posts": [
    {
      "id": "p1",
      "author": "Horikita Suzune",
      "color": "#c49ab8",
      "text": "Study group tonight at 18:00, Room 203.",
      "ts": "2026-04-27T10:00:00Z",
      "likes": 12,
      "comments": [
        { "author": "Kushida Kikyo", "color": "#d4a574", "text": "I'll be there!" }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "shop_items": [
    {
      "name": "Premium Study Set",
      "price": "¥3,000",
      "emoji": "📚",
      "category": "Stationery",
      "description": "Notebooks, pens, and organizers.",
      "stock": 15
    }
  ]
}
```

-----

## `screen` Values

|Value            |What shows                               |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------|
|`"home"`         |Home screen with app grid                |
|`"chats"`        |Chat contact list                        |
|`"chat"`         |Open chat thread — requires `active_chat`|
|`"social"`       |Social feed                              |
|`"shop"`         |Shop item grid                           |
|`"bank"`         |Bank — balance + transactions            |
|`"bank_transfer"`|Transfer form                            |
|`"settings"`     |Settings                                 |

Set `active_chat` to a contact ID when `screen` is `"chat"`.

-----

## Field Reference

### Top-level

|Field       |Description                                                          |
|------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
|`time`      |In-world clock shown on the home screen / status bar. No live clock — set it to the CURRENT story time (never the real-world time).|
|`date`      |Date label e.g. `"Monday, Apr 27"`                                   |
|`user.name` |User’s display name (used in Social compose, Bank account)           |
|`contacts`  |Array of contact objects                                             |
|`chats`     |Map of contact ID → message array                                    |
|`bank`      |Bank account object                                                  |
|`posts`     |Array of Social feed posts                                           |
|`shop_items`|Array of shop product objects                                        |

### Bank object

|Field           |Description                                                  |
|----------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
|`balance`       |Current balance (number)                                     |
|`currency`      |Currency symbol shown before amount, e.g. `"¥"`, `"$"`, `"€"`|
|`account_name`  |Account holder name                                          |
|`account_number`|Account number shown on card                                 |
|`transactions`  |Array of transaction objects (newest last)                   |

### Transaction object

|Field        |Description                                               |
|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
|`id`         |Unique transaction ID                                     |
|`type`       |`"credit"` (money in, green) or `"debit"` (money out, red)|
|`amount`     |Amount (number)                                           |
|`description`|Display label e.g. `"Monthly Allowance"`                  |
|`from`       |Source name — used for credits                            |
|`to`         |Destination name — used for debits                        |
|`ts`         |In-world time — a plain `"HH:MM"` (e.g. `"21:47"`) or an ISO 8601 timestamp with an in-world date                                        |

### Post object

|Field     |Description                               |
|----------|------------------------------------------|
|`id`      |Unique post identifier                    |
|`author`  |Author display name                       |
|`color`   |Author avatar color                       |
|`text`    |Post content                              |
|`image`   |Optional image URL                        |
|`ts`      |In-world time — a plain `"HH:MM"` (e.g. `"21:47"`) or an ISO 8601 timestamp with an in-world date                        |
|`likes`   |Like count (number)                       |
|`comments`|Array of `{ author, color, text }` objects|

### Shop item object

|Field        |Description                              |
|-------------|-----------------------------------------|
|`name`       |Item name                                |
|`price`      |Price string e.g. `"¥3,000"` or `"$9.99"`|
|`emoji`      |Fallback icon if no image                |
|`image`      |Optional image URL                       |
|`category`   |Category label for filter tabs           |
|`description`|Item description                         |
|`stock`      |`0` = out of stock                       |

-----

## Send Formats

### Chat Messages

```
[ Chat: Horikita Suzune ]
─────────────────────────────────
1. Hey
2. I'm almost there
─────────────────────────────────
Monday, Apr 27  15:30
```

Each message is numbered. Treat all as {{user}} sending in-world. Respond naturally, then include the NPC reply in `chats` on the next `<PHONE>` state.

-----

### Social Actions

```
[ Social Actions ]
─────────────────────────────────
1. [LIKE] Post — "Study group tonight..."
2. [COMMENT on Post — "Study group..."] I'll be there too!
3. [REPLY to Kushida on Post — "Study group..."] Same time?
4. [NEW POST] Just finished my evening run 🏃
─────────────────────────────────
Monday, Apr 27  15:30
```

Respond naturally. Update `posts` in the next state to reflect new likes, comments, and posts.

-----

### Shop Order

```
[ Order Placed ]
─────────────────────────────────
1. Premium Study Set × 2 @ ¥3,000
2. Protein Bar (Box) × 1 @ ¥1,200
─────────────────────────────────
Total: 7200.00
─────────────────────────────────
Monday, Apr 27  15:30
```

Respond to the purchase in narrative. Deduct from `bank.balance` in the next state if desired.

-----

### Bank Transfer

```
[ Bank Transfer ]
─────────────────────────────────
1. To: Horikita Suzune  Amount: ¥5,000 (Study materials)
─────────────────────────────────
Monday, Apr 27  15:30
```

Respond to the transfer in narrative. Update `bank.balance` and add a debit entry to `transactions` in the next state.

-----

### Receiving Money

To show that {{user}} received money, add a `credit` transaction to `bank.transactions` and update `bank.balance`:

```json
{ "id": "t5", "type": "credit", "amount": 5000, "description": "Transferred funds", "from": "Kushida Kikyo", "ts": "2026-04-27T16:00:00Z" }
```

-----

## Time — always the in-world clock
The phone has NO live clock; every time it shows is whatever you put in the state, so it must track the STORY's time, not the real world.
- `time` / `date`: the current in-world time and date (e.g. `"21:47"`, `"Saturday, Jul 18"`). Advance them as the scene moves.
- message / post / transaction `ts`: the in-world time of that item — a plain `"HH:MM"` is fine (e.g. `"21:47"`), or an ISO 8601 timestamp with an in-world date. Both display as in-world time.
- Never use the real-world date or clock for any of these. When {{user}} replies from the phone, keep the same in-world time so their sent messages read on story time too.

-----

## Key Rules

- **Full state every time** — always include contacts, full chat history, bank data, posts, and shop_items.
- `"from": "self"` = message sent by {{user}}.
- `"from": "contact_id"` = message sent by an NPC.
- Group messages require both `from` (contact ID) and `from_name` (display name).
- **Time is the in-world clock, never the real world.** Set `time`/`date` from the current story time and advance them as the scene moves. Each `ts` may be a plain in-world time like `"21:47"` OR an ISO 8601 timestamp using an in-world date — both render as in-world time. Never stamp the real-world date/time.
- `bank`, `posts`, and `shop_items` can be omitted or set to empty if not used in the current story.
- If {{user}} writes in Thai, write message and post text in Thai too.
